name: Smart Parking Limited
summary: Smart Parking Limited designs, develops, and manages parking technology in New Zealand, Australia, the United Kingdom, and internationally. It operates in Technology, Parking Management, and Research and Development segment. The company develops and sells smart city and Internet of Things (IoT) technology, hardware, and software for parking solutions. It offers SmartCloud platform, a Web-based service platform that gathers and processes information; Smart Parking Mobile App, which shows real-time guidance and payment information for motorists; digital guidance signage that provides real-time space availability and car park capacity information, as well as directions to traffic flow; Vehicle Detection Sensors, which monitor bays and relay live status information to SmartCloud; and SmartSpot Gateway, an IoT gateway that allows various devices to connect and provide areas of open connectivity. The company also provides automatic number plate recognition camera systems; overhead guidance indicators; and Pay & Walk machines to pay for parking or validate vehicle's presence in the car park. It also offers parking management solutions to the retail sector, managing agents, and land owners. The company was formerly known as Car Parking Technologies Limited and changed its name to Smart Parking Limited in July 2013. Smart Parking Limited is based in Port Melbourne, Australia.
